This "Australia-plus" model targets platforms like TikTok and Instagram, with stricter rules for gaming and AI chatbots. The government emphasizes protecting children's safety and happiness, with enforcement expected by spring 2027.

title: NEET-UG 2026 refund scam foiled; Bihar student arrested for hacking candidates' accounts
description: NEET UG 2026 cyber fraud: Gujarat Police's Cyber Crime Branch, in coordination with the NTA, has arrested a 19-year-old Bihar student for allegedly attempting to divert NEET UG 2026 fee refunds into his own bank accounts. Investigators found that the accused targeted around 350 candidate accounts and gained unauthorized access to nearly 150 accounts with weak passwords. The fraud was detected through the NEET portal's security systems, enabling authorities to trace and apprehend the accused before widespread financial losses occurred.

description: India began their Women's T20 World Cup campaign with a 64-run win over Pakistan, powered by Deepti Sharma's five-wicket haul and Smriti Mandhana's 68. After the victory, Shreyanka Patil revealed she battled depression and even considered quitting cricket during her injury layoff. The all-rounder credited her family's support and love for the game for helping her return.

description: A Home Guard was brutally murdered by her husband in Bengaluru after he lured her to a reconciliation meeting. The husband has been arrested.

Kanpur man ends life after power outage kills aquarium fish
description: A 22-year-old man in Kanpur allegedly died by suicide after his pet fish perished due to a prolonged power outage. His family reported he was deeply attached to the aquarium inhabitants. The incident occurred in the Cantonment area, with police investigating the death, which appears to be a suicide. The body has been sent for post-mortem.
